title: Secure summarizeTranscript path sandbox (041)
description: ISS-041: transcript-summary.summarizeTranscript 对 stdin transcript_path 无 root/realpath allowlist，可任意读文件并流入 digest/events。实现 known client transcript roots 沙箱 + size/suffix 限制，并扩展 summarize-transcript 测试。
action: In packages/cli/templates/hooks/lib/transcript-summary.cjs::summarizeTranscript, before readFileSync: reject non-absolute paths; resolve realpath (or realpath of existing parent + basename); require path under allowlisted roots [join(homedir(),'.claude','projects'), join(homedir(),'.codex')] (plus optional FABRIC_TRANSCRIPT_ROOTS env override for tests); require .jsonl suffix; enforce max size default 8*1024*1024 via statSync; on any fail return empty {user_messages:[],edit_paths:[],title:'',assistant_turns:[]}. Update packages/cli/__tests__/summarize-transcript.test.ts with allow/deny cases.

criteria: packages/cli/templates/hooks/lib/transcript-summary.cjs contains realpath/realpathSync (or equivalent) and prefix allowlist check before readFileSync(transcriptPath)
summarizeTranscript rejects relative paths and paths outside ~/.claude/projects and ~/.codex (and any explicit test roots) by returning empty summary without throw
summarizeTranscript enforces .jsonl suffix and a max byte size gate before full read
packages/cli/__tests__/summarize-transcript.test.ts includes at least one denied path case (e.g. /etc/passwd or tmp outside roots) and one allowed-under-root case
convergence.definition_of_done: 越界 transcript_path 无法被 summarizeTranscript 读取；合法 client transcript 仍可摘要；SEC-001/ISS-041 可 close。

files.change: Add absolute-path + realpath prefix allowlist under known roots; .jsonl suffix; size cap; fail-closed to empty summary
Add tests: outside root denied; relative denied; allowed path under temp root via env/test seam still parses CC/Codex shapes

implementation: Introduce helper isAllowedTranscriptPath(transcriptPath) in transcript-summary.cjs using path.isAbsolute, fs.realpathSync (try/catch), path.resolve/relative, and root list from os.homedir()+'.claude/projects' and os.homedir()+'.codex'
Add test seam: if process.env.FABRIC_TRANSCRIPT_ROOTS is set (comma-separated absolutes), use those roots instead/in addition so vitest can mkdtemp under allowlist
Gate: suffix must be .jsonl (case-sensitive or lowercased); statSync size <= MAX_TRANSCRIPT_BYTES (8MB default constant)
Keep existing parser logic for CC + Codex envelopes unchanged after successful open
Update summarize-transcript.test.ts: write fixtures under allowed temp root; assert deny for path outside roots and for non-.jsonl; ensure existing shape tests still pass via root seam
Run summarize-transcript + fabric-hint-cite tests; ensure fabric-hint re-export summarizeTranscript still works

reference.pattern: fail-closed empty summary (existing ENOENT/catch behavior); client roots from Claude Code projects + Codex home

rationale.chosen_approach: prefix allowlist on realpath is minimal, behavior-preserving for legitimate client transcripts, and closes arbitrary file read without redesigning digest pipeline
decision_factors: stdin transcript_path is untrusted input from hook payload
rationale.tradeoffs: Custom nonstandard transcript locations need FABRIC_TRANSCRIPT_ROOTS; acceptable for security default

risks: realpath on missing file — resolve parent carefully or fail-closed
tests currently write to tmpdir outside default roots — must use env seam or inject roots
symlink escape if only string-prefix without realpath
